title: Xtra Crispy Malaysian Vegetable Noodles
description: A crispy and savory Malaysian dish featuring a variety of vegetables and noodles, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This shojin-friendly recipe uses fast action yeast and a brine-dry method to create a deliciously crispy texture.

ingredients.name: brine solution
ingredients.notes: 1/4 cup salt, 1/4 cup sugar, 1 cup water

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the thinly sliced onion and cook until it is lightly browned and crispy.
Add the grated carrots and shredded cabbage to the skillet and cook until they are tender.
In a small bowl, mix the fast action yeast with the brine solution and let it sit for 5 minutes.
Add the yeast mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked rice noodles to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and yeast mixture.
Season the noodles with soy sauce and stir to combine.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
